name: Acolyte
description: You have spent your life in service to a temple, learning sacred rites and providing for the spiritual needs of others.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Calligrapher's Supplies, Holy Symbol, Book (Prayers), 5 Sticks of Incense, Vestments, 8 GP

name: Artisan
description: You began your life as an apprentice to a master artisan, learning a trade and the business of a guild.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Abacus, Merchant's Scale, Pouch, 25 GP, Artisan's Tools

name: Charlatan
description: You have always had a way with people, and you use that talent to deceive and manipulate.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

name: Criminal
description: You have a history of breaking the law and surviving in the underworld.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Crowbar, Dagger (2), Pouch, Thieves' Tools, 16 GP

name: Entertainer
description: You thrive in front of an audience, whether you're telling stories, making music, or performing acrobatics.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

name: Farmer
description: You grew up on a farm, learning to work the land and care for animals.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Carpenter's Tools, Healer's Kit, Sickle, Pouch, 23 GP

name: Guard
description: You served as a member of a city watch, a noble's personal guard, or a mercenary company.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Gaming Set, Hooded Lantern, Manacles, Quiver, Spear, Pouch, 12 GP

name: Guide
description: You lived your life in the wilderness, guiding others through treacherous terrain.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Cartographer's Tools, Bedroll, Fishing Tackle, Quiver, Shortbow, Pouch, 2 GP

name: Hermit
description: You lived in seclusion, perhaps in a remote monastery or a cave, seeking enlightenment or hiding from the world.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Herbalism Kit, Bedroll, Book (Philosophy), Oil (3 flasks), Quarterstaff, Pouch, 15 GP

name: Noble
description: You were born into a family of high status and privilege.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Gaming Set, Fine Clothes, Signet Ring, Pouch, 24 GP

name: Sage
description: You spent your life in study, learning the secrets of the multiverse.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Calligrapher's Supplies, Book (History), Parchment (8 sheets), Pouch, 8 GP

name: Sailor
description: You worked on a ship, sailing the seas and braving the elements.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Navigator's Tools, Dagger, Silk Rope (50 ft), Pouch, 10 GP

name: Scribe
description: You worked as a clerk or record-keeper, documenting the affairs of a city or noble house.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Calligrapher's Supplies, Book (Blank), Ink, Pen, Pouch, 23 GP

name: Soldier
description: You were trained in the art of war and served in a military unit.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Gaming Set, Quiver, Shortbow, Spear, Pouch, 14 GP

name: Wayfarer
description: You have spent your life traveling from place to place, surviving on your wits and the kindness of strangers.

ability_scores.description: Increase three of these scores by 1, or one by 2 and another by 1.

equipment: Thieves' Tools, Bedroll, Dagger (2), Pouch, 16 GP
